case_title: OCEANWIDE CENTER, LLC. VS. ALL PERSONS UNKNOWN

docket_entries.description: REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF OCEANWIDE CENTER, LLC. NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR FINAL JUDGMENT UNDER DESTROYED LAND RECORDS RELIEF LAW IS GRANTED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)
